title: Vectors, Geometry, and Multivariable Functions
description: Build, test, and communicate a model involving navigation and spatial sensing. Learners cumulatively produce a reproducible vector geometry computational study through theory, guided work, debugging, transfer, retrieval, and assessment.
objectives: Formulate vector spaces in a dimensioned applied model and defend the method's assumptions.
Derive dot cross products in a dimensioned applied model and defend the method's assumptions.
Compute planes surfaces in a dimensioned applied model and defend the method's assumptions.
